caps.proposition_text: The clinician recommends a knee brace.

evidence.span_text: At this point, I discussed the diagnosis and treatment options with the patient. I have recommended a knee brace. She will take Motrin 800 mg, every 6 hours with food, for two weeks. She will use crutches for the next couple of days. She will follow up with me in 1 week for a repeat evaluation. If she is not better at that time, we will obtain an MRI. All questions were answered.

caps.proposition_text: Motrin will be administered at a dose of 800 mg.

Ms. Thompson is a 43-year-old female who presents today for an evaluation of right knee pain. She states she was trying to change a lightbulb on a ladder, and she twisted her knee when she stumbled and caught herself from falling yesterday. She has been applying ice and taking Ibuprofen without relief.

caps.proposition_text: The patient will follow up with the clinician.
